steps.name: Domain: Enter key confirms search and returns to Browse
criteria: Enter in Search mode transitions mode back to Browse
search_query is preserved after Enter (filtered view stays active)
filtered_rows remains as-is (not reset to full commit_rows)
cursor resets to 0 on Enter (start of filtered result set)
steps.implementation_notes: In handle_search_key, add arm: KeyCode::Enter => { model.mode = AppMode::Browse; model.cursor = 0; } — search_query and filtered_rows are intentionally NOT reset. Esc already handles the 'cancel search' path (clears query + restores all rows). Enter is 'confirm search' — user wants to browse the filtered results. Update proptest valid_events() to include KeyCode::Enter in Search-mode context (it already includes Enter generically; confirm it doesn't break the invariant). Write 1 example test: enter_in_search_mode_confirms_and_returns_to_browse.

steps.name: TUI: Search mode rendering — search bar and match-count status bar
criteria: When model.mode == AppMode::Search, view() renders a search input line showing '/ <query>' at the bottom of the main area
In Search mode, status bar shows 'N of M commits | Esc cancel' where N = filtered_rows.len(), M = commit_rows.len()
In Browse mode after confirmed search (non-empty search_query), status bar shows 'Row N/M | q quit' as before (no change to existing Browse status bar)
In Search mode with empty query, status bar shows '0 of M commits | Esc cancel' — wait, actually 'M of M commits | Esc cancel'
cargo build passes; no existing tests regress
steps.implementation_notes: In view.rs, split the layout into 3 chunks when in Search mode: table area (Min(0)), search bar (Length(1)), status bar (Length(1)). In Browse mode keep the existing 2-chunk layout. Search bar line: render a Paragraph showing format!('/ {}', model.search_query) with a cursor indicator. Status bar in Search mode: format!('{}  of {} commits | Esc cancel', model.filtered_rows.len(), model.commit_rows.len()). Status bar in Browse mode: existing format_status_text logic unchanged. Add a pure helper fn search_status_text(filtered: usize, total: usize) -> String. No acceptance test for this step — validated by cargo build + visual inspection.

validation.note: 2-step scope for slice-03. Domain (slash/Esc/filter) already shipped in slice-01. Remaining: Enter confirmation behavior (03-01) and Search mode view rendering (03-02).
